allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data.get\('items', []\)[:15]: print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']:>6} | Updated: {r['updated_at'][:10]} | Lang: {r.get\('language','N/A'\):>8} | {r['full_name']}\\"\) print\(f\\" {r['description'][:120] if r['description'] else 'No description'}\\"\) print\(f\\" URL: {r['html_url']}\\"\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data.get\('items', []\)[:15]: print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']:>6} | Updated: {r['updated_at'][:10]} | Lang: {r.get\('language','N/A'\):>8} | {r['full_name']}\\"\) print\(f\\" {r['description'][:120] if r['description'] else 'No description'}\\"\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys r = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f\\"Name: {r['full_name']}\\"\) print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']}\\"\) print\(f\\"Forks: {r['forks_count']}\\"\) print\(f\\"Language: {r['language']}\\"\) print\(f\\"License: {r['license']['name'] if r.get\('license'\) else 'N/A'}\\"\) print\(f\\"Topics: {r.get\('topics', []\)}\\"\) print\(f\\"Description: {r['description']}\\"\) print\(f\\"URL: {r['html_url']}\\"\) print\(f\\"Last updated: {r['updated_at']}\\"\) print\(\) print\('README \(first 3000 chars\):'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, base64 r = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'content' in r: content = base64.b64decode\(r['content']\).decode\('utf-8'\) print\(content[:5000]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data.get\('items', []\)[:20]: name = r['full_name'] stars = r['stargazers_count'] lang = r.get\('language','N/A'\) desc = \(r['description'] or 'No description'\)[:100] print\(f\\"Stars: {stars:>6} | {lang:>8} | {name}\\"\) print\(f\\" {desc}\\"\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys r = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']} | Lang: {r['language']} | {r['full_name']}\\"\) print\(f\\"Topics: {r.get\('topics', []\)}\\"\) print\(f\\"Description: {r['description']}\\"\) " echo "---" curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/flackbash/AudioAnchor")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys r = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']} | Lang: {r['language']} | {r['full_name']}\\"\) print\(f\\"Topics: {r.get\('topics', []\)}\\"\) print\(f\\"Description: {r['description']}\\"\) " echo "---")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Android audiobook repos \(Java/Kotlin\):'\) for r in data.get\('items', []\)[:10]: print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']:>6} | {r.get\('language','N/A'\):>8} | {r['full_name']}\\"\) print\(f\\" {\(r['description'] or 'No desc'\)[:100]}\\"\) " echo "---")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for f in data: if 'build' in f['name'].lower\(\) or 'gradle' in f['name'].lower\(\): print\(f['name']\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(data, list\): for f in sorted\(data, key=lambda x: x['name']\): print\(f['name']\) else: print\(data.get\('message', 'Could not read'\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data.get\('tree', []\): if 'Book.kt' in item['path'] and '/main/' in item['path']: print\(item['path']\) ")
